source.title: BSEE Accident Investigation Report - GI 43 AP Platform Loss of Containment

event.incident_type: Unauthorized discharge of pollutants into offshore waters
actions_taken: Placed process alarms and safety system devices in bypass function
Wrapped pipe with absorbent pad and gray duct tape
Initiated field-wide shut-in of all production
Reported sheen to National Response Center
BSEE inspectors arrived and verified facility shut-in
event.summary: On January 26, 2018, at the GI 43 AP Platform in the Gulf of Mexico, a loss of containment of hydrocarbons and gas releases occurred. Control Room Operators experienced abnormal operating conditions due to sand and sludge buildup and chemical flocking affecting level sensors. Safety devices were placed in bypass to prevent equipment shutdown while operators flushed level bridles. A hole was discovered in the Gas Vent Header Piping at 1:18 am leaking hydrocarbons. The leak was temporarily sealed with duct tape and absorbent pad. Due to communication failures and personnel falling asleep, the platform continued flowing until 6:45 am when a sheen was observed and a field-wide shut-in was initiated. The incident resulted in a 10-mile sheen and discharge from 5 locations on the platform. Root causes included sludge buildup, collapsed internal packing, failed sump pumps, safety device bypass, and failure to use Stop Work Authority.
recommendations: Fieldwood announced new safety culture initiative 'Safe and Sound' emphasizing Stop Work Authority

threats.name: Sludge and chemical flocking buildup affecting level sensors
Collapsed internal packing in Skim Tank
Corrosion of Gas Vent Header Piping
Safety device bypass during abnormal conditions
Failure to use Stop Work Authority

consequences.name: Unauthorized discharge of hydrocarbons into Gulf of Mexico
Property damage and equipment replacement costs

controls.name: Guided radar level sensors
controls.lod_basis: Primary detection system for process control

supporting_text: operators thought that the abnormal conditions were due to false level reading from the process guided radar level sensors due to chemical flocking becoming stuck on the guided radar tube

controls.name: Process alarms in Programmable Logic Controller
controls.barrier_role: Automatic shutdown of equipment during abnormal conditions
controls.lod_basis: Safety system to prevent continued operation during upset conditions

supporting_text: The CRO placed process alarms and safety system devices in 'by-pass function' in the Programmable Logic Controller (PLC) to prevent equipment from shutting-in while operators flushed level bridles
With the safety devices in bypass, the safety system did not shut-in the vessels or facility which lead to hydrocarbons being discharged

controls.name: Equipment maintenance and cleaning procedures
controls.barrier_role: Prevention of sludge and chemical flocking buildup
controls.lod_basis: Preventive maintenance to maintain equipment integrity

supporting_text: A failure to maintain production equipment through cleaning and maintenance
Fieldwood's investigation found a buildup of internal debris and chemical flocking affecting the separation process

controls.name: Timely remediation of production issues
controls.barrier_role: Addressing recurring operational problems before they escalate
controls.lod_basis: Management oversight to prevent recurring issues

supporting_text: sludge buildup in the vessels had been a recurring problem which was relayed to upper management
BSEE determined that the company failed to remediate production issues in a timely matter

controls.name: Stop Work Authority
controls.barrier_role: Empowerment of operators to halt operations when unsafe conditions exist
controls.lod_basis: Human intervention to prevent continued operation during unsafe conditions

supporting_text: A failure to use 'Stop Work Authority' by operators
Fieldwood failed to instill a culture conducive for use of 'Stop Work Authority'
platform personnel felt pressure from the company to not shut in production

controls.name: Sump pump operation and maintenance
controls.barrier_role: Maintain oil level in sump to prevent overflow discharge
controls.lod_basis: Equipment to control liquid level in sump system

supporting_text: the Open Drain Sump (ZBH-30341) could not maintain a set oil level due to the Sump Pump (PBH-30341) failing, allowing oil in the Sump bucket to overflow and discharge into the GOM

controls.name: Skim Tank internal packing integrity
controls.barrier_role: Maintain separation process and prevent liquid carryover

supporting_text: the internal packing inside the Skim Tank had collapsed and plugged flow
This sludge and packing buildup affected the process of the Skim Tank and other downstream equipment

controls.name: Gas Vent Header Piping integrity and inspection
controls.lod_basis: Primary containment barrier for vent gas

supporting_text: at 1:18 am they found a hole in the Gas Vent Header Piping leaking hydrocarbons through the grating and into the Gulf of Mexico
Failed section of Vent Header Piping – replacement: $3,000. Includes the materials to replace the small section of vent piping where the hole (corrosion) developed

controls.name: Incident communication and escalation procedures
controls.barrier_role: Ensure timely notification and response to incidents
controls.lod_basis: Procedural control for incident response and reporting

supporting_text: The Field Foreman fell back asleep and therefore the platform remained flowing until the following morning
At approximately 6:45 am, a field wide shut-in of all production was initiated by the Area Foreman after he noticed the sheen (after daylight)

controls.name: Safety culture and management oversight
controls.barrier_role: Foster organizational culture that prioritizes safety and Stop Work Authority
controls.lod_basis: Organizational control to prevent unsafe practices

supporting_text: Fieldwood failed to instill a culture conducive for use of 'Stop Work Authority'
platform personnel felt pressure from the company to not shut in production

notes.rules: JSON output only. mentioned fields must be evidence-based. Use null for unknown values.
